title: Park Avenue Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Park Avenue Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Park Avenue Global Group! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Park Avenue Global Group:
Park Avenue Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
